title: Epitaph On Lord Stratford de Redcliffe
content:
Thou third great Canning, stand among our best
And noblest, now thy long day�s work hath ceased,
Here silent in our Minster of the West
Who wert the voice of England in the East.
meaning:
"Epitaph On Lord Stratford de Redcliffe" is a quintessential example of Alfred Lord Tennyson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
